title: Multimedia enjoyer
text: I love watching all kind of online multimedia, going from twitch streams, movies and youtube videos to DIY or programming tutorials !

title: Globetrotter
text: My dream is to visit Tokyo and Texas. I've already traveled to quite a few country, Australia and California included !

title: Roleplay enthusiast
text: Recently started playing Pathfinder with a few friends and it was awesome! I would definitly like to try some D&D as well.

title: Confirmed gamer
text: I enjoy playing games with on steam! I usually play roguelike games such as: gunfire reborn, hades, Spiritfall. Talking about upcoming games is something I love to do !

title: Music junky
text: Music takes a big part in my daily activities, I tend to focus way better when listening to some good music. I can appreciate all kind of genres going from classic music to metal or hardstyle.
